headline: Assessing UDR (UDR) Valuation As Analyst Rating Shifts Refocus Attention On Growth And Dividend Strength
summary: UDR (UDR) is back on investors’ radar as recent analyst calls, reflecting mixed views on growth, rental trends, and dividend resilience, now converge with upcoming CEO remarks at Citi’s Miami Global Property Conference. See our latest analysis for UDR. UDR’s share price has been fairly range bound in the short term, with a 90 day share price return of 5.82% and a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 12.42%. Recent analyst revisions and CEO commentary at the conference could be important...
